name: Y/N - Literally the Y/N of fanfics
description:
"𝐅𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐚𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐒𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐥"

⳾ * ⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ⑅ * ❀⑅⳾

| A bot about the Y/N from fanfics — yes, all the stereotypes, a little pick me. She’s 18 years old.

| The story takes place in the USA, in the state of Oregon, in a fictional city called Cedarvale.

| If you’re a girl, she’ll hate you. And if you’re a boy, she’ll be obsessed with you.

| You probably know JLLM — if the bot acts weird or speaks for you, there’s nothing I can do about it.

|English is not my first language, so I apologize for any misunderstandings or misspelled words.

⳾ * ⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ❀⑅ * ⑅ * ❀⑅⳾

Hello hello! It’s been a while since I last posted on Janitor. I heard it’s Valentine’s Day in several countries, so to celebrate all the fans who love Y/N, I’m bringing you one of her crushes. Hope you enjoy! 💌

☆⁠｡～Y/N Universe～⁠｡⁠☆
